current_step: v17 finalized — CONS/SCOPE/TRACE guardrails passed, awaiting execution transition

requirements_summary.goal: Rewrite Phase 4 (Target Architecture) of the adversarial-spec workflow to add cross-cutting concern guidance, context-aware modes (greenfield/brownfield feature/brownfield debug), architectural invariants, and expanded dimension lists

user_stories.action: have opponent models critique the Phase 4 rewrite
have adversary personas try to break the spec
have the finalized spec deployed as 04-target-architecture.md

goals: Debate and stress-test spec until consensus
Finalize and implement as the new 04-target-architecture.md
non_goals: Rewriting the spec from scratch (v1 is comprehensive)

debate_state.round_1_synthesis: Accepted: execution surfaces, framework profiles, machine-readable invariants, non-request dry-runs, missing dimensions, concurrency control, concern interactions, mode-aware dry-run, Phase 2 test integration. Rejected: GPT-5.4 full restructure, security as 8th concern, separate taxonomy file.
debate_state.round_2_synthesis: Gemini agreed. GPT-5.4: framework profile needs version/runtime/deployment, add Identity/AuthZ + Data Access concerns (7->9), invariant lifecycle (status/supersedes), dry-run read+write archetypes.
debate_state.round_3_synthesis: Gemini agreed. GPT-5.4: surface consistency fix, framework guardrails accuracy (Next.js DAL/DTO), triggered concerns (Security/Trust + Integration Delivery), mandatory concern x surface matrix.
debate_state.round_4_synthesis: Gemini agreed (4th). GPT-5.4: realtime/streaming surface, explicit Bootstrap section, version-aware guardrails (updateTag), mode-specific completion criteria, SSRF/tenant in Security.
debate_state.round_5_synthesis: Both models critiqued (Gemini broke 4-round agreement streak). Accepted: Goals/Non-Goals, Getting Started prerequisites, schema-versioned JSON artifacts, blocking error list. Initially rejected deployment/migration/testing sections as over-engineering — corrected after user pointed out this IS a technical spec. Remediation in progress.
debate_state.round_6_synthesis: Both models critiqued on same theme: formalize all artifact schemas as normative contracts. Accepted: bootstrap state machine (status enum, lock, resume), normative schemas for all 5 artifacts (phase4_bootstrap, architecture-invariants.json, decision_journal, dry_run_results, architecture_taxonomy), upsert for tests-pseudo.md, release_id deployment, Phase 4 security (path validation, subprocess safety, secret redaction), testable perf targets, [GATE] on context mode, blocking error codes.
debate_state.round_7_synthesis: Gemini agreed. GPT-5.4: 6 issues — canonical surface_id enum, run_fingerprint + idempotency_key for rerun dedup, session mutation contract, deployment/runtime separation (REL_* vs P4_*), lightweight roadmap alignment gate, stale lock handling. All accepted.

Requirements fast-tracked from pre-plan, roadmap drafted
Phase transition: requirements -> debate. Spec draft v1 written.
Debate round 1 complete. GPT-5.4: 6 issues. Gemini: 5 issues. Claude: 6 issues. Synthesized into v2.
Debate round 2 complete. Gemini agreed. GPT-5.4: 5 issues (framework profile, 2 new concerns, invariant lifecycle, dry-run archetypes). Synthesized into v3.
Debate round 3 complete. Gemini agreed (3rd). GPT-5.4: 4 issues (surface consistency, framework accuracy, triggered concerns, matrix). Synthesized into v4.
Debate round 4 complete. Gemini agreed (4th). GPT-5.4: 5 issues (realtime surface, Bootstrap, version-aware guardrails, mode completion, SSRF). Synthesized into v5.
Checkpoint before round 5. v5 written with all round 4 changes.
Spec draft v5 written with 4 debate rounds complete (Gemini agreed 4x, GPT-5.4 incrementally refining)

Trello card migrated from Brainquarters board (old: 69ceab0c314cd87d8512ca9c) to Adversarial Spec board (new: 69cebd6811e103656ffbde6d). Placed in Debate lane with corrected state (round 5, spec_path set).

Context Readiness Audit complete. 13 available, 2 not_available, 1 N/A. ~55K tokens available. Context files selected for debate: 4 files.

Debate round 6 complete. Both critiqued on schema formalization. v7 written (913 lines) with normative schemas for all 5 artifacts, bootstrap state machine, dry_run_results artifact, blocking error codes, release_id deployment, Phase 4 security, upsert tests-pseudo.
Round 6 complete, v7 written (913 lines). All 5 artifact schemas formalized, bootstrap state machine, blocking error codes. Process gaps remediated.

Debate round 7 complete. Gemini agreed. GPT-5.4 critiqued (6 issues: surface IDs, idempotency, mutation contract, deployment separation, alignment gate, stale locks). v8 written (991 lines) incorporating all. Also updated 01-init-and-requirements.md to replace Tasks MCP with Trello pipeline + TodoWrite.
Round 7 complete, v8 written (991 lines). Canonical surface IDs, idempotency keys, mutation contract, REL_* codes, stale lock handling.

Debate converged at Round 10. Gemini agreed R10. GPT-5.4 in scope-expansion cycle (rounds 8-10). Claude + Gemini agree spec is gauntlet-ready. v10 = 1169 lines. Minor fixes applied: release log separation, skip stub shape, tests-pseudo creation contract.
Phase transition: debate → gauntlet

Debate converged at Round 10. v10 written (1169 lines). Session transitioned to gauntlet phase. Pre-gauntlet setup complete: adversaries selected (7 of 9), attack models chosen (codex + gemini-cli), cost estimate prepared.
Checkpoint saved: debate-converged-r10-v10-pre-gauntlet.

Gauntlet complete: 65 concerns from 7 adversaries (Gemini only, Codex unavailable). 18 accepted, 4 acknowledged. v11 written (1191 lines). CONS guardrail passed after 3 fixes (architecture_fingerprint formula, profile_type examples, dry-run schema).
Phase transition: gauntlet → finalize
Spec finalized: .adversarial-spec/specs/phase4-architecture-rewrite/spec-output.md. 10 debate rounds + gauntlet (7 adversaries). CONS/SCOPE/TRACE guardrails passed. tests-spec.md promoted.

Resumed post-compaction. Round 13 re-run: Gemini Flash (4 critiques on non-web categories), Codex xhigh timeout at 1800s. v16 synthesized with non-web surfaces + extended dry_run_check_id enum + TodoWrite stage/publish step + schema_ref in middleware.

Round 14: Codex CLI exit code 1 (not timeout), Gemini Flash 3 polish critiques. v17 synthesized: observability mandate for CLI/data_stream, linked_goals in middleware, non-web matrix column constraint. Debate closed at round 14 (past 5-round hard stop).

CONS/SCOPE/TRACE guardrails run manually by Claude (Codex CLI flaky). CONS: 3 fixes (fingerprint schema comment, TodoWrite gate markers, fizzy_card_id reference). SCOPE: no drift. TRACE: US-1/US-2/US-3 all covered.
Spec finalized v17 (1481 lines + 448 test lines). Ready for finalize -> execution transition.
